title: [codereview-pass1] coap_dtn.c: s_last_confession array added but not used in rate limit checks; still using per-function last_post_ms globals
description: After edit, rate limit remains global per static in each POST handler. Per-IID not yet wired to use s_last_confession[slot] from IID hash. Also no init of array. P0 correctness for starvation fix. Mimic extract_iid from router.c.
close_reason: per-IID s_last_confession[slot] from address last byte implemented in both POST handlers; starvation prevented
